name: MHC_class1_orangutan
description: Pongo abelii Popy-A/B/C class I cluster. Orangutan-lineage MHC nomenclature uses 'Popy-' prefix (e.g. Popy-A, Popy-B, Popy-C). Trans-species polymorphism shared with human HLA; ape-specific paralog expansions and losses documented in Suntsova 2017 and T2T-ape 2024.

architecture.internal_structure: Ape MHC: extensive haplotype divergence, trans-species polymorphism, ape-lineage gene duplications (Patr-AL, Gogo-AL etc.).
